title: Identical submissions dedup to a cached job for 24 hours (from_cache: true)
summary: Submitting an identical SpiderMaps payload within 24 hours returns the SAME job_id with from_cache: true — a cached result, not a fresh scrape. This is great for idempotent retries but a trap if the user actually wants fresh data or you're looping a batch with duplicate queries. Force a fresh run by varying the query or setting test: true. The submit response always carries from_cache; check it.
references: app/api/v1/jobs/common.py:514 — 'Automatic deduplication: Returns cached job if submitted within 24 hours'
